case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. SABRINA R GOLDSMITH

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. SERVED AUG-31-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT GOLDSMITH, SABRINA R
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER NTC AND HEARING RE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: PATRICK HEARD, CSR # 11055

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT GOLDSMITH, SABRINA R $5,386.58 PRINCIPAL, $260.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,646.58, SEE SCANNED DOC (NO S.A.S.E., COPY IN D. 301 OUT BOX)
